observations: Iter-1 with-skill already maxed assertions because they were derived from the SKILL.md itself plus surrounding CLAUDE.md context. The numeric ceiling masks a real improvement: in iter-1 the files-examined.md content came from CLAUDE.md, in iter-2 it is in the skill itself — invocations without CLAUDE.md context will now succeed.
Sharper assertions would be needed to numerically capture the iter-2 improvement (e.g., 'answer does NOT depend on outside files'). Logged in FINAL.md as a methodology note.
Baseline scores unchanged (skill not consulted in the baseline arm).
